title: ROE (Return on Equity)
content: ROE = Net Income / Shareholder Equity. Measures profitability relative to equity. Higher is better, industry-dependent.

title: Revenue Growth Rate
content: Revenue Growth = (Current - Previous) / Previous * 100. Indicates business expansion speed.

title: Gross Margin
content: Gross Margin = (Revenue - COGS) / Revenue * 100. Higher margins indicate stronger pricing power.
